Pharmacy_Name: The name of the pharmacy where prescriptions are purchased directly.
Pharmacy_Out_Of_Pocket_Cost: The average cost patients pay out-of-pocket for prescriptions when purchased directly from the pharmacy.
MediConn_Out_Of_Pocket_Cost: The average cost patients pay out-of-pocket for prescriptions when using MediConn's prescription management service.
Savings_Percentage: The percentage of savings patients can expect when using MediConn's service compared to the direct pharmacy purchase.
